---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest an idea for FlowCraft
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Problem Statement

A clear description of the problem this feature would solve.
Example: "I cannot do X when Y happens..."

## Proposed Solution

Describe the solution you'd like. Be as specific as possible.

## Alternatives Considered

What alternative solutions or workarounds have you tried?

## Use Case

Who would benefit from this feature and how?

## Additional Context

Screenshots, references, or any other context.
